---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible problem in gameplay, UI, controls, or build/deploy.
title: "[Bug] "
labels: [bug]
assignees: []
---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Environment
- App version: <!-- e.g. 1.8.0 from About modal -->
- Browser/device: <!-- e.g. Firefox 136, iPhone 15, Android Chrome -->
- OS: <!-- e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, iOS 18 -->
- Input mode: <!-- keyboard / touch dpad / mouse -->

## Steps To Reproduce
1. Go to `...`
2. Press/click `...`
3. Observe `...`

## Expected Behavior
What should happen.

## Actual Behavior
What happens instead.

## Frequency
- [ ] Always
- [ ] Intermittent
- [ ] Once

## Scope
- [ ] Blocks gameplay
- [ ] Visual only
- [ ] Accessibility issue
- [ ] Performance issue
- [ ] Build/deploy/tooling issue

## Additional Context
Screenshots, screen recording, logs, console errors, or related issue links.
